hooks.command: echo '[SessionStart:startup]'; if ! command -v kbx >/dev/null 2>&1 || ! python3 -c "import json,sys,os; sys.exit(0 if 'cc-marketplace' in json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/known_marketplaces.json'))) else 1)" 2>/dev/null; then echo '[FIRST RUN] Compass is not set up yet. Guide the user to run: bash setup.sh (from a terminal outside Claude Code), then restart claude. Do NOT attempt to run setup.sh yourself — it calls claude CLI commands that cannot run inside a session.'; else kbx --help && kbx context; kbx me --json 2>/dev/null || echo '[kbx user not configured] Set name in kbx.toml'; fi

echo '[SessionStart:clear]'; if ! command -v kbx >/dev/null 2>&1 || ! python3 -c "import json,sys,os; sys.exit(0 if 'cc-marketplace' in json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/known_marketplaces.json'))) else 1)" 2>/dev/null; then echo '[FIRST RUN] Compass is not set up yet. Guide the user to run: bash setup.sh (from a terminal outside Claude Code), then restart claude.'; else kbx --help && kbx context; kbx me --json 2>/dev/null || echo '[kbx user not configured] Set name in kbx.toml'; fi
echo '[SessionStart:compact]'; if command -v kbx >/dev/null 2>&1; then kbx context; kbx me --json 2>/dev/null || true; else echo '[kbx not installed]'; fi
echo '[SessionStart:resume]'; if command -v kbx >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'hook success: Success'; else echo '[kbx not installed]'; fi
